ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the victim */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the victim */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the victim */,
  "raceethnicity" TEXT /* Race and ethnicity of the victim */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the incident */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the incident */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the incident */,
  "incident_time" TEXT /* Time of the incident */,
  "streetaddress" TEXT /* Street address of the incident */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the incident */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the incident */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the incident location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the incident location */,
  "state_fp" INTEGER /* State FIPS code */,
  "county_fp" INTEGER /* County FIPS code */,
  "tract_ce" INTEGER /* Census tract code */,
  "geo_id" TEXT /* Geographic identifier (GEOID) */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the county */,
  "namelsad" TEXT /* Census tract name */,
  "lawenforcementagency" TEXT /* Law enforcement agency involved in the incident */,
  "cause" TEXT /* Cause of the incident (e.g., Gunshot) */,
  "armed" TEXT /* Whether the victim was armed (e.g., No, Firearm) */,
  "pop" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "share_white" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is White */,
  "share_black" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is Black */,
  "share_hispanic" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is Hispanic/Latino */,
  "p_income" INTEGER /* Per capita income of the county */,
  "h_income" INTEGER /* Median household income of the county */,
  "county_income" INTEGER /* Average income of the county */,
  "comp_income" REAL /* Comparison of county income to national average (1 = lower, 2 = average, 3 = higher) */,
  "county_bucket" INTEGER /* Income bucket of the county (1-5, with 1 being the lowest and 5 being the highest) */,
  "nat_bucket" INTEGER /* Income bucket of the county relative to the national average (1-5, with 1 being the lowest and 5 being the highest) */,
  "pov" REAL /* Poverty rate of the county */,
  "urate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the county */,
  "college" REAL /* Percentage of the population with a college degree */,
  "incident_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the incident */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer involved in the incident */,
  "officer_rank" TEXT /* Rank of the officer involved in the incident */,
  "officer_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the officer involved in the incident */,
  "officer_raceethnicity" TEXT /* Race and ethnicity of the officer involved in the incident */,
  "officer_age" INTEGER /* Age of the officer involved in the incident */,
  "incident_status" TEXT /* Current status of the incident */,
  "case_number" TEXT /* Unique case number assigned by the law enforcement agency */,
  "media_coverage" TEXT /* Level of media coverage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "victims" (
  "victim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each victim */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the victim was involved in */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the victim */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the victim */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the victim */,
  "raceethnicity" TEXT /* Race and ethnicity of the victim */,
  "armed" TEXT /* Whether the victim was armed (e.g., No, Firearm) */,
  "victim_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the victim */,
  "victim_occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the victim */,
  "victim_marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the victim */,
  "victim_education" TEXT /* Educational background of the victim */,
  "victim_income" INTEGER /* Annual income of the victim */,
  "victim_residence" TEXT /* Place of residence of the victim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("victim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_victims_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident that occurred at the location */,
  "streetaddress" TEXT /* Street address of the incident */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the incident */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the incident */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the incident location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the incident location */,
  "location_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location */,
  "location_size" TEXT /* Size of the location */,
  "location_ownership" TEXT /* Ownership of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "law_enforcement_agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each law enforcement agency */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the agency was involved in */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the law enforcement agency */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the agency */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the agency */,
  "agency_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the agency */,
  "agency_type" TEXT /* Type of law enforcement agency */,
  "agency_size" INTEGER /* Number of officers in the agency */,
  "agency_budget" INTEGER /* Annual budget of the agency */,
  "agency_website" TEXT /* URL of the agency's official website */,
  "agency_founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the agency was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_law_enforcement_agencies_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident that occurred in the county */,
  "pop" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "share_white" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is White */,
  "share_black" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is Black */,
  "share_hispanic" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is Hispanic/Latino */,
  "p_income" INTEGER /* Per capita income of the county */,
  "h_income" INTEGER /* Median household income of the county */,
  "county_income" INTEGER /* Average income of the county */,
  "comp_income" REAL /* Comparison of county income to national average (1 = lower, 2 = average, 3 = higher) */,
  "county_bucket" INTEGER /* Income bucket of the county (1-5, with 1 being the lowest and 5 being the highest) */,
  "nat_bucket" INTEGER /* Income bucket of the county relative to the national average (1-5, with 1 being the lowest and 5 being the highest) */,
  "pov" REAL /* Poverty rate of the county */,
  "urate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the county */,
  "college" REAL /* Percentage of the population with a college degree */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the county population */,
  "median_house_value" INTEGER /* Median value of houses in the county */,
  "household_size" REAL /* Average household size in the county */,
  "language_spoken" TEXT /* Most common languages spoken in the county */,
  "veteran_population" REAL /* Percentage of the population that are veterans */,
  "public_transportation" REAL /* Percentage of households without a car and using public transportation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "census_tracts" (
  "tract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each census tract */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident that occurred in the census tract */,
  "tract_ce" INTEGER /* Census tract code */,
  "geo_id" TEXT /* Geographic identifier (GEOID) */,
  "namelsad" TEXT /* Census tract name */,
  "tract_population" INTEGER /* Population of the census tract */,
  "tract_area" REAL /* Area of the census tract in square miles */,
  "tract_density" REAL /* Population density of the census tract (people per square mile) */,
  "tract_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the census tract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_census_tracts_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "causes" (
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cause */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "cause" TEXT /* Cause of the incident (e.g., Gunshot) */,
  "cause_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the cause */,
  "cause_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the cause */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cause_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_causes_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the user */,
  "user_affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* Position or title of the user */,
  "user_joined_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the incident */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the incident was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the access event */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "county_fips" (
  "fips_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each FIPS code */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "state_fp" INTEGER /* State FIPS code */,
  "county_fp" INTEGER /* County FIPS code */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "county_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fips_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_fips_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "state_fips" (
  "fips_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each FIPS code */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "state_fp" INTEGER /* State FIPS code */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fips_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_fips_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)
